title: SandboxRegistrationResponse
description: Response from Session Service after successful sandbox registration. Contains everything the sandbox needs to operate.

sessionId.description: Session this sandbox is assigned to.

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID for artifact storage and file sync.

workspaceServiceUrl.description: URL of the Workspace Service for artifact uploads and file sync.

llmGatewayEndpoint.description: URL of the LLM Gateway for model calls.
